steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrases “cannot remain the dominion only of academics” and “to leave to historians alone” establish that the author views history as too something to leave only to professionals.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Critical means essential or vital. If history is critical to democracy, it's too important to confine to specialists.
The other choices either fail to express importance (respectable, accessible) or confuse difficulty with importance (complex).
That matches choice D — D is correct.
